seasons.name: Origins
seasons.subtitle: The Birth of NumbahWan
seasons.description: Where it all began. Meet the founding members of NumbahWan and discover the Sacred Log.
seasons.lore: In the chaos of the MMO world, RegginA founded NumbahWan guild. Through epic raids, dramatic guild chat, and the discovery of the Sacred Log artifact, the guild grew from nothing to legendary status.

seasons.name: Hounds of War
seasons.subtitle: Harlay's Pack Rises
seasons.description: Harlay assembles the ultimate pack. 13 legendary dogs join the guild, each with unique abilities.

newMechanics.PACK: Gains +1/+1 for each other Dog on your board
newMechanics.HOWL: When played, all Dogs gain +1 ATK this turn
newMechanics.LOYALTY: Cannot be targeted by enemy effects while Harlay is on board
newMechanics.FETCH: When this card attacks, draw a card

seasons.lore: After proving himself in countless battles, Harlay was given command of his own division. He recruited 12 elite dogs from across the gaming world, forming the most fearsome pack the guild has ever seen.

bonus.description: Dogs from this set gain bonus stats when played together

seasons.name: Cyber Siege
seasons.subtitle: The Digital Uprising
seasons.description: Coming Soon - The guild enters the digital realm
seasons.lore: When a mysterious virus threatens the game servers, NumbahWan must venture into cyberspace itself...

progression.description: Each season builds on the last, introducing new characters and mechanics while keeping the guild story moving forward.
